title: The Rusting Dreadnought
description: A derelict Null-Forged dreadnought drifts silently in the void. Faint energy signatures detect a sealed cargo bay, but the hull is leaking concentrated Decay.

choices.choice_text: Force the airlock open with raw power.

outcomes.text: The airlock blows, damaging the party, but you salvage some Faith.
You tear the doors open cleanly and raid the vault.

choices.choice_text: Send the Necro-Mechanic to interface with the ship's dead AI.

outcomes.text: Your proxy commands the ship to yield its greatest treasure.

title: Frozen Data Core
description: You discover a massive sub-zero computing core holding lost archives. Accessing it could yield ancient knowledge, but its automated defenses are active.

outcomes.text: You bypass the security and download a minor axiom protocol.
The core detects intrusion and summons synthetic wardens!

choices.choice_text: Let it sleep. We have our mission.

outcomes.text: You drift past the core unharmed.

title: Synthetic Graveyard
description: Thousands of deactivated Null-Forged chassis float here. One of them seems to still possess a faint spark of life.

choices.choice_text: Harvest its remaining Dark Matter reserves.

outcomes.text: Your proxies absorb the dark matter, increasing Capacity.

choices.choice_text: Sacrifice HP to restart its core.

outcomes.text: The core flares but dies, sapping your energy for nothing.
The unit revives momentarily and hands you a component before crumbling.

title: Quantum Singularity Trap
description: Your path intersects with a localized micro-singularity. It pulls at your ship's hull, demanding a sacrifice of either speed or energy.

choices.choice_text: Burn Dark Matter to escape the pull.

outcomes.text: You burn away precious ephemeral faith but escape unscathed.

choices.choice_text: Reroute power to shields and brace for impact.

outcomes.text: The hull groans, and your proxies are battered by gravity waves.
The anomaly strips a dormant relic from the void and deposits it on your deck!

title: The Cipher's Whisper
description: A rogue AI transmission echoes into your proxies' minds, offering algorithmic perfection in exchange for sensory input.

outcomes.text: Your spiritual hit chance increases, but your bodies become sluggish.
The transmission fades into static.

title: The Golden Tollbooth
description: A monolithic tollbooth of absolute gold blocks the hyper-lane. An automated Lumina warden demands tithe in the name of Pontiff-Imperator Solarius.

outcomes.text: The gates open, and a sterile blessing heals your party.
The blessing of Order washes over you.

choices.choice_text: We are Gods. We pay no toll.

outcomes.text: The warden activates its laser shielding. Defend yourselves!

title: Cathedral Ruins
description: Floating debris of a shattered techno-cathedral caught in a localized stasis field.

outcomes.text: You find scattered lockboxes of Faith.
You discover a pristine artifact overlooked by looters.

choices.choice_text: Use the Time-Paladin to reverse the stasis.

outcomes.text: The Paladin witnesses the cathedral's past and learns a new doctrine.

title: Chronometric Fracture
description: A localized fracture in spacetime loops a 5-minute window eternally. Inside, a lesser Lumina is trapped.

choices.choice_text: Shatter the loop with raw power.

outcomes.text: The backlash of time energy burns your proxies.
The freed energy bolsters your Physicality permanently.

title: The Scales of Judgment
description: A massive, floating scale demands balance. One side holds a heavy, dark weight. The other is empty.

choices.choice_text: Place your own vitality on the scale (Lose 25% Max HP).

outcomes.text: The scales balance. A powerful relic materializes.
You continue your journey unburdened.

title: Dogmatic Broadcast
description: Solarius's voice blasts across all comm channels, repeating an infinitely complex legal theorem.

outcomes.text: Your proxies gain immense Spiritual Defense, but lose their ability to improvise (Dodge).

title: Leyline Convergence
description: Two volatile streams of raw planetary magic collide here, creating a localized storm of pure potential.

outcomes.text: The energy reinvigorates your proxies completely.
The magic is too wild and burns your proxies from the inside.

choices.choice_text: Use the Geomancer to channel it safely.

outcomes.text: The Geomancer crystallizes the magic into solid Faith.

title: The Shimmering Mirage
description: A perfect, illusory copy of your party stands before you, mocking your every move.

outcomes.text: You waste energy fighting phantoms.
You strike true, shattering the illusion and absorbing its essence.

title: Elemental Roulette
description: A floating casino run by mutated Espers offers a game of chance. Wager your Faith for a chance at high-tier Relics.

outcomes.text: You lose your wager to a rigged game.
Jackpot! You win a powerful artifact.
You save your Faith for more certain endeavors.

title: Volcanic Eruption
description: The planet beneath you splits open, spewing magma into orbit. Your ship's thrusters are caught in the updraft.

choices.choice_text: Ride the thermal updraft to skip the next node.

outcomes.text: You are propelled forward rapidly, bypassing the next sector.

choices.choice_text: Collect the rare magma cores ejecting past you.

outcomes.text: The heat is too intense, but you grab some cores.
You successfully snatch a perfectly formed Magma Core.

title: Whispers of the Maelstrom
description: Ignis-Tal's madness bleeds into reality here. You hear voices offering power at a cost.

choices.choice_text: Listen to the voices (Gain 1 Epic Talent, random character loses 50% HP).

outcomes.text: Knowledge floods your mind, but at a painful price.

title: The Overgrown Spire
description: A massive, bioluminescent tree has grown completely through an ancient orbital station. Its fruits pulse with restorative energy.

outcomes.text: The fruits are delicious and deeply restorative.
The fruits were actually dormant Sylvan spawn! They attack.
The Warden channels the tree's latent energy, expanding the party's vitality.

title: Symbiotic Offering
description: A parasitic organism floats toward your ship, offering enhanced perception if you let it attach to one of your proxies.

outcomes.text: Your critical strikes are deadlier, but your maximum MP is drained.
You burn away the threat safely.

title: The Dreamer's Nexus
description: You enter a zone of suspended animation spores. Your proxies begin to hallucinate their deepest desires.

outcomes.text: The sudden shock damages their psyche.
They wake up with renewed clarity.

choices.choice_text: Let them sleep a little longer (Skip turn in next combat).

outcomes.text: They awaken fully rested, but will be groggy in the next fight.

title: Flesh-Shaper's Workshop
description: An abandoned biomedical lab filled with terrifying, half-finished organic experiments.

outcomes.text: You find a useful, albeit gross, organic tool.
One of the experiments wakes up!

title: Chorus of the Hive
description: Elyria's psychic hive-mind extends a tendril of pure emotional connection towards you. It feels overwhelming, but peaceful.

outcomes.text: The psychic feedback stings, but your minds remain your own.
You glean secrets from the hive-mind before pulling away.
The connection was too strong. You lose some of your individual willpower.
